summary: PR 2741 linked the sysdolphin baselib hsd_40FF data unit by adding a large int data array for hsd_8040FF80, marking the symbol as data:int, adding a block relocation for a dbbonus GXColor, and switching hsd_40FF.c from NonMatching to Matching. The bot report shows +134080 linked bytes for main/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF .data and +7 bytes for main/melee/db/dbbonus .data.

key_files.role: Added the linked .data payload as int hsd_8040FF80[] with force_active pragmas; file grew from effectively empty to 6709 added lines.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: hsd_40FF.c adds #pragma push, #pragma force_active on, and int hsd_8040FF80[] initializer

key_files.role: Header touched with 5 added lines; exact content not present in loaded diff excerpt.
Updated hsd_8040FF80 symbol metadata to include data:int.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: hsd_8040FF80 = .data:0x8040FF80 changes from no data type to data:int

key_files.role: Added a block relocation source for a GXColor in dbbonus at 0x803EAE10.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: config.yml adds comment '# GXColor in dbbonus' and source 0x803EAE10

key_files.role: Changed sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c build object status from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: configure.py changes Object(NonMatching, "sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c") to Object(Matching, "sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c")

what_changed.text: Linked hsd_8040FF80 as a large int array in src/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c.
Marked hsd_8040FF80 in symbols.txt as data:int while preserving address .data:0x8040FF80 and size 0x20BC0.
Added block relocation source 0x803EAE10 for a dbbonus GXColor.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: config.yml added '# GXColor in dbbonus' and source 0x803EAE10

what_changed.text: Promoted sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c to Matching in configure.py.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: configure.py MatchingFor object status change

what_changed.text: Bot report recorded 2 new data matches: hsd_40FF .data 0.00% to 100.00% (+134080 bytes) and dbbonus .data 91.35% to 100.00% (+7 bytes).

smart_moves.text: The PR updated symbol typing, relocation config, and build matching status together, which kept the data-unit link reflected across the config surfaces needed by the matcher.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: bot report linked data +134080 bytes

smart_moves.text: The dbbonus block relocation was isolated and documented with a local comment, tying a small +7 byte dbbonus data match to the specific GXColor source address.

decomp_lessons.text: For a data-only baselib unit, symbol metadata can be decisive: this PR made hsd_8040FF80 an int-typed .data object in symbols.txt and supplied the corresponding int array in the source TU.
Data matching work may need companion block_relocations entries when neighboring or referenced data affects exact linkage; here adding source 0x803EAE10 coincided with dbbonus .data reaching 100%.

naming_conventions.text: The PR retained the existing address-style data symbol name hsd_8040FF80 rather than inventing a semantic name for the large data blob.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Used #pragma push and #pragma force_active on around the hsd_8040FF80 data definition so the large data object is retained for linking.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: hsd_40FF.c begins with #pragma push and #pragma force_active on
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Loaded excerpt shows force_active but is truncated before any closing pragma, so the exact pragma scope cannot be fully audited from this slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.text: Changed configure.py object classification from NonMatching to Matching after adding data and config metadata.
Added block_relocations source 0x803EAE10 for the dbbonus GXColor to resolve a small data-match gap.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR number/title/state/author/timestamps and changed file counts
diff_excerpt/raw_diff: config.yml, symbols.txt, configure.py, and start of hsd_40FF.c changes
notes: Strong evidence for changed files, config edits, symbol typing, build status change, and bot-reported data-match deltas.
The PR body is empty and there are no review comments, so author motivation and reviewer intent are not available.
The raw diff is truncated in loaded evidence; hsd_40FF.c is a very large initializer and hsd_40FF.h content is not visible, so detailed header claims are avoided.
The bot report provides matching/linkage percentages and byte deltas, but no build log, objdiff output, or local validation transcript beyond the report.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2741 linked hsd_40FF data by pairing source data with symbol typing and build status
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2741, hsd_40FF.c was promoted from NonMatching to Matching after adding int hsd_8040FF80[] in src/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c and marking hsd_8040FF80 as data:int in config/GALE01/symbols.txt. The bot report showed main/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF .data moving from 0.00% to 100.00% for +134080 bytes.

accepted_candidate_records.title: PR 2741 added a dbbonus GXColor block relocation
accepted_candidate_records.text: The PR added config/GALE01/config.yml block_relocations entry source 0x803EAE10 under the comment 'GXColor in dbbonus'; the bot report recorded main/melee/db/dbbonus .data improving from 91.35% to 100.00% for +7 bytes.

source_update_candidates.title: hsd_40FF.c is a data-linked baselib unit centered on hsd_8040FF80
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2741 made src/sysdolphin/baselib/hsd_40FF.c a Matching data unit by adding int hsd_8040FF80[] and corresponding symbols.txt data:int metadata for .data:0x8040FF80 size 0x20BC0.
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scoped context for future hsd_40FF data maintenance; curator should verify full source because loaded diff is truncated.

source_update_candidates.title: dbbonus GXColor block relocation at 0x803EAE10
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2741 added a GALE01 block_relocations entry labeled 'GXColor in dbbonus' with source 0x803EAE10, and the bot report showed dbbonus .data reaching 100% with +7 bytes.
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential data-sheet fact about dbbonus GXColor relocation; curator should confirm ownership and address semantics before promoting.

source_update_candidates.title: Data-link PRs should keep symbol metadata, source declarations, relocation config, and build status synchronized
source_update_candidates.text: This PR is an example where a data-linking change touched symbols.txt data typing, source data declaration, config.yml block relocations, and configure.py Matching status together. This may be worth documenting as a review checklist for data-link PRs, not as a new mandatory standard without broader evidence.
source_update_candidates.reason: PR provides a concrete example, but one PR alone is not enough to promote a global rule without curator review.

rejection_notes: Do not infer semantics for the contents of hsd_8040FF80 beyond an int data array; the PR uses an address-style name and provides no explanatory body text.
Do not infer detailed hsd_40FF.h declarations; only the 5-line addition count is loaded.
Do not treat force_active pragmas as generally approved style from this PR alone; the slice shows their use but not the full pragma scope or alternative attempts.
